responseMessageContents.title: Finalized the owner login recovery system and the global search engine for investor traffic.
responseMessageContents.description: This update fixes the owner's sign-in process, allowing for manual login and secure SMS recovery. It also launches the global search engine that automatically finds and organizes potential investors, creates landing pages in multiple languages, and provides a dashboard to track growth. All systems have been tested and are now live in production.
